mapper.select: select name from schoolyear where name=#{schoolyear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into schoolyear(id,name) values((select max(id)+1 from schoolyear),#{schoolyear})
mapper.select:
select count(t.id) as num from questiontype t where t.isdefault = 1
and t.name = #{qtname}

select count(t.id) as num from unit t where t.state = 1
and t.name like '%'||#{name}||'%'

select count(t.id) as num from specialty t inner join unit u on t.unitid = u.id where
t.state = 0
t.state = 1
and t.unitid !='null'
and (u.name like '%'||#{name}||'%' or t.name like '%'||#{name}||'%')

select count(t.id) as num from examtype t where
t.isdefault = 0
t.isdefault = 1
and (t.name like '%'||#{name}||'%')

select t.id, t.name, t.contact, t.tel,t.code from UNIT t where 1 = 1
and t.name like '%'||#{name}||'%'
and t.state = 0
and t.state = 1
order by t.code
desc nulls last
asc nulls last

select t.id, t.name, t.uname, t.contact, t.tel,t.code from DEPARTMENT t where
t.state = 0
t.state = 1
and t.unitid = #{uid}
order by nlssort(t.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
order by t.code
desc nulls last
asc nulls last

select t.id, t.name as sname, u.name as uname, u.id as unitid from SPECIALTY t left join unit u on t.unitid = u.id where
t.state = 0
t.state = 1
and (u.name like '%'||#{name}||'%' or t.name like '%'||#{name}||'%')
order by nlssort(t.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
order by t.unitid, t.sorder
mapper.insert:
insert into questionType
name,
e_name,
qdesc,
e_qdesc,
iscon,
answertypeid,
isdefault,
qorder,
xxdf,
mediaSet,
#{name},
#{e_qtname},
#{desc},
#{e_qtdesc},
#{iscon},
#{answertypeid},
#{isdefault},
#{qorder},
#{xxdf},
#{mediaSet},

SELECT U01_SEQ.currval FROM DUAL
insert into unit
id,
name,
contact,
tel,
code
select U01_SEQ.nextval,
#{uname},
#{contact},
#{tel},
#{code}
from dual
mapper.select:
select count(*) from department d where d.unitid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and d.name = #{dname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and d.id != #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into department
name,
unitid,
uname,
contact,
tel,
code,
#{dname},
#{uid},
#{uname},
#{dcontact},
#{dtel},
#{code},

insert into examtype
name,
id,
isdefault,
eorder
#{name},
#{id},
1,
(select count(t.id)+1 from examtype t)
insert into grade(id,name) values((select max(id)+1 from grade),#{gname})
mapper.update:
update department
name = #{dname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact = #{contact,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
code = #{code,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id, name from department where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
update unit
name = #{uname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact = #{contact,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update specialty
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
unitid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update examtype
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update addr4exam
name = #{aname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detail = #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seatnum = #{seatnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
minip = #{minip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
maxip = #{maxip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update department d set d.uname = #{uname} where d.unitid = #{id}
update unit u set u.state = 0 where u.id = #{id}
update department d set d.state = 0 where d.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update department d set d.state = 1 where d.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update specialty s set s.state = 0 where s.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update examtype e set e.isdefault = 0 where e.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from examtype e where e.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select count(*) from examtype where name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from questiontype q where q.id=#{id}
mapper.update: update specialty s set s.state = 1 where s.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update examtype e set e.isdefault = 1 where e.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LOG01_SEQ.currval FROM DUAL
insert into sys_log (id,name,ip,content,addtime,cid) select LOG01_SEQ.nextval, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{addtime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.select:
select sl.name,sl.content,sl.ip from sys_log sl where 1 = 1
and sl.addtime>=to_date(#{limit_time},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and (sl.name like '%'||#{value}||'%' or sl.content like '%'||#{value}||'%')
order by sl.addtime desc

select count(sl.id) as num from sys_log sl where 1 = 1
and sl.addtime>=to_date(#{limit_time},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and (sl.name like '%'||#{value}||'%' or sl.content like '%'||#{value}||'%')
select ip,name,content,addtime from sys_log where addtime < to_date(#{time},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') order by id
mapper.delete: delete from sys_log where addtime < to_date(#{time},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
delete from sys_log where addtime between to_date(#{bdate},'yyyy-MM-dd') and to_date(#{edate},'yyyy-MM-dd')
delete from course_specialty cs where cs.spid = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from system s where s.name is not null
select * from system s where s.name=#{name}
mapper.update:
update system s
s.param=#{param},
s.yl_1=#{yl_1},
s.yl_2=#{yl_2},
s.yl_3=#{yl_3},
s.yl_4=#{yl_4},
s.yl_5=#{yl_5},
where s.name=#{name}
mapper.select: select name from unit where id = #{unitId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select name from specialty where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select name from examtype where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select count(*) from unit where name = #{uname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and id != #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update unit set state = 1 where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
merge into student s using (select id, name from specialty) sp on (s.specialtyid = sp.id) when matched then update set s.specialty = sp.name
mapper.delete: delete from role_permission rp where rp.rid=#{rid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into role_permission(rid,pid)
select #{rid},#{item} from dual
mapper.update: update department set state = 0 where unitid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select d.name from department d where d.unitid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select c.name_c as name from course c where c.unitid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.real_name as name from teacher t where t.unitid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select t.num, t.name, t.ip, t.sid, t.eid, t.logintime, t.device from STUDENT_EXAM_LOGIN_RECORD t where 1 = 1
and t.eid like '%'||#{eid}||'%'
and t.num like '%'||#{num}||'%'
and trunc(t.logintime ,'DD') = #{time}
order by nlssort(t.num,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
order by nlssort(t.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
order by t.ip
order by t.sid
order by t.eid
order by t.logintime
desc
asc
order by t.logintime desc

select count(*) from STUDENT_EXAM_LOGIN_RECORD t where 1 = 1
and t.eid like '%'||#{eid}||'%'
and t.num like '%'||#{num}||'%'
and trunc(t.logintime ,'DD') = #{time}
select * from menu_role m
select t.id,t.name,t.mlevel,t2.name as pname,t.parentid from menu t left join menu t2 on t.parentid=t2.id where t.state=1 and t.id!='1' order by t.mlevel,t.morder
select * from menu_role m where m.mid=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into menu_role(mid,rid)
select #{mid},#{item} from dual
mapper.select: select t.id,t.name,t.morder,t.mlevel from menu t where t.state=1 and t.id!='1' order by t.mlevel,t.morder
mapper.update: update menu m set m.morder= #{morder} where m.id=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select q.qid as qid, q.iscon as qtiscon, cor.name_c as cname, q.content as content, q.mqid as mqid, q.answerid as answerid, q.answertime_bachelor as answertime, q.answerexplain as answerexplain, q.distinction as distinction, q.filepath as filepath, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.creatorid as creatorid, q.score as score, vt.name as verifyname, t.name as creatorname, vt.real_name as verifyrealname, t.real_name as creator, q.num as num, cc.name as coname, cd.name as dname, ck.name as kname, cs.name as soname, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.atid as atid, t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name, q.th as th from exampaper_question_db q left join course cor on cor.id=q.cid left join teacher t on q.creatorid=t.id left join teacher vt on q.verifyid = vt.id left join theme t1 on q.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on q.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on q.theme3id = t3.id left join cognition cc on q.cognitionid_bachelor = cc.id left join difficulty cd on q.difficultyid_bachelor = cd.id left join knowledge ck on q.knowledgeid_bachelor = ck.id left join source cs on q.sourceid = cs.id left join exampaper_questiontype qt on qt.qtid=q.qtid and qt.eid=q.eid where q.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.mqid = #{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by to_number(q.qid)
select * from teacher
mapper.update: update teacher t set t.pass=#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where t.id=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select * from teacher t where t.logintime is null
mapper.update: update questiontype set qorder=${qorder} where id=#{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM LISTENING_EXAM_RECORD t WHERE t.listenTime <= TRUNC(SYSDATE-30)
